sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36853" key="e(caplasiepi/tritos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξαπλᾰσι-επίτρῐτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n36853.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">six and one-third times as much,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:4:109" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.109</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
